interpretation: On-chain AMM execution shows a near-1x optical-to-executable gap: the Curve pool dislocation, net of bounded slippage and the 1bp swap fee, is almost always capturable. This contrasts sharply with the 12x CEX order-book gap, showing the optical-to-executable gap is a property of CEX microstructure (thin depth, taker fees, settlement delay), not of stablecoin depegs per se.
